summary: Regression testing after major refactoring (server.py split + FollowUpDialog extraction). Found and fixed 2 critical bugs in frontend. All 28 backend API tests passed. Frontend pages load correctly.

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing state declarations for loadingFollowUps and followUpHistory
bugs_fixed.fix: Added useState declarations for loadingFollowUps and followUpHistory in all three files

bugs_fixed.issue: Infinite re-render loop - loadHistory() called directly in render phase
bugs_fixed.fix: Wrapped loadHistory() call in useEffect hook with proper dependencies

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful - server.py reduced from 13,500+ lines to ~125 lines
FollowUpDialog shared component extracted and working correctly
All 30 route modules properly imported and registered
Fixed missing state declarations in Doctors/Medicals/Agencies pages
Fixed infinite re-render bug in FollowUpDialog component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 completed regression testing after major refactoring. Key findings: 1) Backend refactoring successful - all 28 API tests pass. 2) Fixed 2 critical frontend bugs: missing state declarations and infinite re-render loop in FollowUpDialog. 3) FollowUpDialog shared component now works correctly on Doctors/Medicals/Agencies pages. 4) All frontend pages load correctly (Dashboard, Doctors, Medicals, Agencies, Settings, Reports, Marketing).

Frontend UI Tests.Dashboard: PASS - Shows stats, customers overview, lead pipeline
Frontend UI Tests.Doctors page: PASS - Shows doctors list with follow-up button working
Frontend UI Tests.FollowUpDialog on Doctors: PASS - Opens correctly with all elements

bug_1.root_cause: State variables loadingFollowUps and followUpHistory were used but not declared with useState
bug_1.fix: Added useState declarations: const [loadingFollowUps, setLoadingFollowUps] = useState(false); const [followUpHistory, setFollowUpHistory] = useState([]);

bug_2.error: Too many re-renders. React limits the number of renders to prevent an infinite loop
bug_2.root_cause: loadHistory() was called directly in render phase (lines 61-63) instead of in useEffect
bug_2.fix: Wrapped the loadHistory() call in useEffect with dependencies [open, loaded, entity?.id]

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKS - All APIs are real
